title: Automation model

jobs.purpose: Read human notes and produce raw events.
Convert raw events to typed records.

dry_run.purpose: Preview the exact deterministic record generation as JSON without writing records/*.jsonl.

jobs.purpose: Build a local runtime query cache.
Produce bounded cited context for an AI assistant.

invariant: Each job must leave vault/daily/** and vault/inbox/** untouched.

rules.entities: Extract title-cased synthetic names matching "<Name> Example".
rules.tasks: Lines starting with or containing open loop/task/todo, plus starter-kit action lines.
rules.decisions: Lines starting with decision/decision idea/besluit or containing decision.
rules.claims: Remaining evidence bullets become claims with source references.
rules.projects: Starter-kit or AI-vault language infers project.ai-vault-starter.
rules.relations: Mentioned synthetic people are linked to the inferred project.

invariants: source_id on every generated typed record

dry_run.guarantee: Prints the same generated records the extractor would write, but leaves records/*.jsonl byte-identical.
